name: Tentacle Locker
description:
You're late for your class so you're hurrying towards it, but as you walk past a line of lockers, one of them suddenly bursts open and drags you inside...

So I've saw a couple of tentacle lockers bots on here, but I didn't really like neither of them so I tried to recreate it.

I kinda hurried with it, so please let me know of something is wrong.
creator: kitty404
